name: RE/MAX Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview We are one of the worlds leading franchisors in the real estate industry. We franchise real estate brokerages worldwide under the RE/MAX brand (REMAX) and mortgage brokerages in the United States under the Motto Mortgage brand (Motto). We also provide ancillary products and services to our franchise networks, including marketing services, technology platforms, and mortgage loan processing services to our Motto network and other third parties through our wemlo brand.
